browser_path.description: Absolute path to a local Edge or Chrome executable.
browser_path.hint: Leave empty to use the default browser lookup in the renderer.

site_dir.description: Absolute path to the dice web app directory.
site_dir.hint: Leave empty to use the plugin's rollmydice_app directory.

default_duration_ms.hint: The value is clamped to a safe range in plugin code.

default_fps.hint: The value is clamped to a safe range in plugin code.
